hero.headline: Your journey to health starts here
hero.subheadline: Expert therapeutic services in Čačak — chiropractic, hijama, dry needling, massage, and more.

about.title: About us
about.subtitle: A professional approach to your wellbeing
about.body: Move & Muscle Therapy is a therapeutic practice dedicated to improving our patients' quality of life. We combine modern manual techniques with a holistic approach — from acute injuries to chronic pain and prevention. Every treatment is individually tailored to your needs.

services.title: Our services
services.subtitle: Every treatment is tailored to your needs

dryNeedling.name: Dry Needling
dryNeedling.description: A precise needling technique targeting muscular trigger points to relieve pain, improve mobility and accelerate recovery.

hijamaWet.name: Hijama — wet cupping
hijamaWet.description: Traditional wet cupping therapy that stimulates circulation and supports the body's natural detoxification.

hijamaDry.name: Hijama — dry cupping
hijamaDry.description: Dry cupping massage to relax muscles, improve blood flow and release tension.

therapeuticMassage.name: Therapeutic massage
therapeuticMassage.description: Deep-tissue massage targeting specific muscular issues, injuries and chronic pain.

relaxMassage.name: Relaxation massage
relaxMassage.description: A full-body relaxing massage to reduce stress, improve sleep quality and restore energy.

chiropractic.name: Chiropractic
chiropractic.description: Manual spinal and joint manipulation to correct alignment and provide lasting pain relief.

pressureBoots.name: Pressure boots
pressureBoots.description: Pneumatic leg compression for faster muscle recovery, reduced swelling and improved circulation.

electrotherapy.name: Electrotherapy
electrotherapy.description: Electrical stimulation therapy for pain relief, tissue regeneration and muscle strengthening.

instagram.title: Follow us
instagram.subtitle: Tips, treatments and results straight from the practice
